findings.evidence: `rg` hits the changed LowDimTopology declarations at `CubeGenerator.lean:416,423,430,437,443,449,455,461`, while the PR description claims the cleanup is under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/`.
findings.fix: Remove the `CubeGenerator.lean` changes from this PR and submit them separately, or retitle/rescope the PR as a repository-wide simpNF cleanup and document that scope.
findings.issue: LowDimTopology plumbing simp-attribute removals are bundled into a PR described as resolving simpNF entries under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/`, making this two maintenance topics.

summary: The PR is not a single coherent unit: an AlgebraicTopology simp-normal-form cleanup also changes LowDimTopology plumbing simp attributes. Split the plumbing cleanup into its own PR, or scope the PR as a repository-wide simpNF cleanup with the relevant evidence.
